title: Wood Axe applies Atk plus three while equipped

plan.title: Wood Axe applies Atk plus three while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Wood Axe to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Atk bonus through battle damage.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Wood Axe.

steps: Player 1 plays Wood Axe and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the Atk bonus applies only while Wood Axe remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses battle damage as the observable Atk modifier output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Wood Axe Atk equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
